review_question: Are ranking, recommendation, moderation, and ad systems recorded with owners and purposes?
Are engagement, revenue, safety, quality, and public-value objectives documented?
Are user agency, creator effects, public-knowledge impact, and vulnerable users reviewed?
Can users and creators understand, challenge, and repair major decisions?
Are classifier thresholds, human review, policy changes, and appeals documented?
Are ad targeting, demonetization, creator revenue, and incentive effects reviewed?
Can harmful ranking or recommendation behavior be detected, paused, rolled back, or redesigned?
